start_date.title: Start date
start_date.description: The start date of the period to include in the resource.

end_date.title: End date
end_date.description: The end date of the period to include in the resource.

period_count.title: Period count
period_count.description: The number of periods to include in the resource.

period_type.title: Period type
period_type.description: The type of period to include in the resource: month, quarter, year.

location_id.title: Location ID
location_id.description: The ID of the location to include in the resource.

accounting_method.title: Accounting Method
accounting_method.description: The accounting method used for the report: cash or accrual.
